ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image file */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient to whom the image belongs */,
  "labels" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of labels for the image */,
  "labels_array" TEXT /* Array of binary values representing the presence or absence of conditions */,
  "label_pneumonia" INTEGER /* Binary value indicating the presence of pneumonia */,
  "split" TEXT /* Data split (train, validation, test) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image (e.g., 512x512, 1024x1024) */,
  "modality" TEXT /* Imaging modality (e.g., X-ray, MRI, CT scan) */,
  "body_part" TEXT /* Body part being imaged (e.g., chest, head, abdomen) */,
  "view" TEXT /* View or orientation of the image (e.g., frontal, lateral, sagittal) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the patient */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was registered in the system */,
  "medical_record_number" TEXT /* Medical record number of the patient */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnosis" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being diagnosed */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the diagnosis was made */,
  "diagnosis_text" TEXT /* Text description of the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosed_by" TEXT /* Name of the medical professional who made the diagnosis */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the diagnosis (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "icd_10_code" TEXT /* ICD-10 code for the diagnosis */,
  "disease_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the disease (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the diagnosis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the diagnosis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnosis_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the medical condition */,
  "severity_scale" TEXT /* Severity scale for the condition (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "parent_condition" INTEGER /* Parent condition (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being labeled */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical condition being labeled */,
  "label_value" INTEGER /* Binary value indicating the presence (1) or absence (0) of the condition */,
  "label_date" TEXT /* Date the label was created */,
  "labeled_by" TEXT /* Name of the medical professional who created the label */,
  "labeling_tool" TEXT /* Labeling tool used (e.g., manual, AI-assisted) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the label was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the label was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_labels_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_labels_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., radiologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the user */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the user was registered in the system */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Medical specialty of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, annotate) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, download, annotate) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being annotated */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text description of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was created */,
  "annotated_by" TEXT /* Name of the medical professional who created the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., text, shape, measurement) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data split */,
  "split_name" TEXT /* Name of the data split (e.g., train, validation, test) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data split */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the data split (e.g., 0.7 for 70% training data) */,
  "split_method" TEXT /* Method used for splitting the data (e.g., random, stratified) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data split was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data split was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_data_splits" (
  "split_assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each split assignment */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being assigned */,
  "split_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data split to which the image is assigned */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the split assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the split assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_data_splits_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_data_splits_split_id FOREIGN KEY ("split_id") REFERENCES data_splits ("split_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being assessed */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the image (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "quality_assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the quality assessment was made */,
  "assessed_by" TEXT /* Name of the medical professional who made the quality assessment */,
  "quality_metric" TEXT /* Metric used to assess image quality (e.g., PSNR, SSIM) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quality assessment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quality assessment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_quality_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_resolution" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being assessed */,
  "resolution_width" INTEGER /* Width of the image in pixels */,
  "resolution_height" INTEGER /* Height of the image in pixels */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the resolution information was recorded */,
  "assessed_by" TEXT /* Name of the medical professional who recorded the resolution information */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., DICOM, JPEG) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resolution information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resolution information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_resolution_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "research_question" TEXT /* Research question or hypothesis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)
